case_title: CARL D. SWANSON VS. HERNAN MUIRRAGUI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2010 - CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MUIRRAGUI, HERNAN
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT MUIRRAGUI, HERNAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWANSON, CARL D.
